LanguageData.ProtossMech.ShieldStatus.Title: Protoss Shield
LanguageData.ProtossMech_ShieldBattery_SelectTargetDe: Manually choose a pawn or building with Protoss shield within {0} cells to charge.
LanguageData.ProtossMech_ShieldBattery_ClearTargetDes: Clear manual target and return to automatic target selection.
